title: Client Profile
description: Brand identity, service offering, geographic targets, and author details for one client deployment of the AJ Digital SEO/AEO Engine.

slug.description: URL-safe, lowercase identifier for this client. Used as the directory name under clients/.

brand_name.description: Full display name of the brand.

site_url.description: Canonical base URL of the client's website (no trailing slash).

niche.description: One-line industry/niche descriptor used to focus keyword research.

primary_city.description: The single primary market city. Used as the default location anchor in prompts.

local_cities.description: All geographic markets to target in keyword research and fast-track routing. Include primary_city as the first element.

seed_topics.description: Core service/topic clusters used to seed the Perplexity intelligence scan each week.

services.description: List of services offered. Used for internal linking, schema markup, and CTA targeting.

primary.description: Mark true for the service that should receive the most internal links.

author.description: Primary content author. Used in bylines, author schema, and AEO validator checks.

name.description: Full legal name as it will appear in bylines and JSON-LD.

title.description: Professional title as it will appear below the byline.

bio_short.description: 1–2 sentence author bio for article footers. 50–120 characters recommended.

linkedin_url.description: LinkedIn profile URL for author schema markup.

photo_url.description: Absolute URL to author headshot (minimum 200×200px, WebP/JPEG).

schema_org.description: Organization-level schema.org properties for JSON-LD generation.

type.description: schema.org type. Use LocalBusiness subtypes where applicable.

social_profiles.description: List of social profile URLs for sameAs schema property.
